Video.summary: Did you know that baby dogs were called whelps until the late 16th century?

Video.summary: Did you know most kittens are born with Blue-Gray eyes that will change pigments within their first year of life?
Video.title: TPC That's My Pet | Kittens

Video.summary: Did you know Lizards can smell stuff with their tongues?
Video.title: TPC That's My Pet | Lizards

Video.summary: Did you know there are over 3,789 snake species and counting. Talk about extended families.
Video.title: TPC That's My Pet | Reptiles

Video.summary: Did you know there are over 70 different species of turtles?
Video.title: TPC That's My Pet | Turtles

Video.summary: Did you know most Corgis don’t have a tail due to evolution?
Video.title: TPC That's My Pet | Corgis

Video.summary: Did you know that a group of young rabbits are called kittens?
Video.title: TPC That's My Pet | Rabbits
